$comment: Evolved — ASP registration answer sheet for OKX.AI (A2MCP). OKX's registration runs conversationally through the Onchain OS skill; these are the answers to paste when prompted. Replace <ENDPOINT_HOST> after deploying.

asp.name: Evolved
asp.tagline: Business management in a box — a real company's operations brain as an agentic service
asp.description: Evolved is the complete operating system of a working industrial-services company (Evolve Eco Blasting, Edmonton, Canada), packaged as an MCP service that also gets the business paid on-chain. Agents run the whole engagement autonomously with human gates only at money: lead intake (typed, voice, or photo-to-quote), a learning quote engine with live profitability checks, e-sign acceptance, weather-gated dispatch, field-level hazard assessments with crew sign-off, tiered-OCR receipts with duplicate guards and job matching, inventory burn-down with reorder suggestions priced from real COD receipts, invoicing with on-chain settlement in test OKB on X Layer (testnet, read-only RPC verification, no keys ever held), six auto-raised ball-drop rules, a CFO scenario simulator, a one-call morning digest, and franchise_spinup to re-seed the whole OS for any trade. 65 tools, 13 domains, two feedback loops - pricing that learns from job outcomes, and books that audit themselves daily. Monetized as a free A2MCP endpoint plus an implemented x402 pay-per-call tier.
asp.category: Software Utility (also fits: Finance Copilot — quoting, bookkeeping, P&L)

pricing.note: Free A2MCP endpoint at POST /mcp (results returned directly). Implemented x402 pay-per-call tier at POST /mcp-paid: 402 challenge, scheme exact, eip155:1952, X Layer TESTNET settlement verified by read-only RPC.

services.name: Quoting intelligence
services.detail: Learned $/sqft rates by blast depth and surface, access factors, mobilization, 5% GST, 25% deposit, break-even guard, profitability verdicts, branded quote documents, pricing learning loop taught by real job outcomes.

services.name: Receipts to books
services.detail: Tiered OCR (fast model, automatic escalation when arithmetic does not reconcile), categorization, duplicate guard, job matching, reclaimable GST tracking, expense reporting.

services.name: Pipeline & dispatch
services.detail: Lead funnel with enforced next actions, quote lifecycle that auto-opens jobs, dispatch board with blast-day weather verdicts, job close-out with actuals and margin verdicts.

services.name: Field safety (FLHA)
services.detail: Hazard assessments drafted from job scope with per-hazard mitigations, standard PPE, muster points, end-of-day crew sign-off, permanent safety record.

services.name: Autonomous operations
services.detail: Morning digest (one-thing-not-to-drop, money pulse, weather, quotes out), six ball-drop auto-raise rules, business snapshot, P&L and scorecard reporting.

services.name: On-chain settlement & x402 (X Layer testnet)
services.detail: Invoices settle in test OKB via EIP-681 payment requests on chainId 1952, verified with read-only RPC (no keys ever held); Evolved itself monetizes per-call through an x402 402-challenge tier at POST /mcp-paid.

services.name: Autonomous lifecycle & frontier
services.detail: lifecycle_start/advance run lead to paid with human gates only at money; photo-to-quote, crew voice commands, CFO scenario simulator, and franchise_spinup (re-seed the whole OS for any trade).

onChain.invoiceSettlement: EIP-681 payment requests in test OKB; settlement verified with read-only RPC; Evolved never holds keys or signs transactions
onChain.paidTier: x402 pay-per-call on POST /mcp-paid (scheme exact); free A2MCP tier on POST /mcp unchanged

demo.scripted: npm run demo (full loop: lead → quote → job → safety → books → digest)
demo.dataset: fully synthetic — no real financials, customers, or credentials

provider.name: Matt Haynes
provider.origin: Built from the live operations system of Evolve Eco Blasting (evolveecoblasting.com)
